name: Chicken Etouffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a large skillet with Pam cooking spray; place over medium heat until hot.
2. Add onion and other vegetables (green pepper, sweet red pepper, celery), sauté until tender.
3. Remove the vegetables from the skillet and set aside.
4. In the same skillet, melt margarine and add flour. Cook over low heat for 5 minutes, stirring constantly until the mixture reaches a copper penny color.
5. Return the cooked vegetables to the skillet.
6. Add the chopped chicken breast and remaining ingredients (water, chicken bouillon powder, thyme, salt, red pepper flakes, hot sauce) except rice and parsley.
7. Simmer for 2 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
8. Serve over hot, cooked rice and sprinkle with fresh parsley.
